header.title: AI Content Pro
header.calendarDisabledTooltip: Generate a campaign plan to activate the calendar
header.strategistDisabledTooltip: Upgrade to Pro to unlock the AI Strategist

userMenu.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

template.label: Template
template.tooltip: Select an existing template to quickly fill the form. You can also save the current settings as a new template for future use.

topic.label: Topic or main message
topic.placeholder: e.g., Introducing a new, eco-friendly shoe model...
topic.tooltip: Enter the main theme, product, or message you want to convey. The more details you provide (e.g., benefits, features), the better the result will be.
topic.assistantTooltip: Get AI suggestions to improve your topic

videoTranscript.label: Transcript or text for video
videoTranscript.tooltip: Paste the text to be used as narration or subtitles in the generated video. AI will use it to create scenes.
videoTranscript.placeholder: Enter text that should appear in the video or be its basis.

form.videoTopicPlaceholder: A short, dynamic video about [your product/topic]
form.videoTranscriptPlaceholderDefault:
Scene 1: A close-up shot of [your product].
Scene 2: Someone using [your product] and looking happy.
Scene 3: A final shot showing the product logo and a call to action.

campaignGoal.label: Campaign Goal
campaignGoal.tooltip: Define the main goal of your campaign, e.g., 'Promote a new, eco-friendly shoe model', 'Increase newsletter sign-ups'.

campaignDuration.label: Campaign duration (in days)
campaignDuration.tooltip: Specify how many days the campaign should last. AI will generate a post plan for this period (minimum 3, maximum 30 days).

audience.label: Target audience
audience.tooltip: Describe your ideal audience, e.g., 'Young professionals interested in sustainable development', 'Fitness enthusiasts looking for healthy snacks'.

keywords.label: Keywords (comma-separated)
keywords.tooltip: Provide keywords for the AI to focus on. This helps in precise topic targeting and SEO optimization.

tone.label: Tone of voice
tone.tooltip: Choose the tone that best fits your brand and message. This will affect the style and vocabulary of the generated text.

platform.label: Platform
platform.tooltip: Select the target platform(s). AI will adapt the format, length, and style of the content to the specifics of each one.

visualStyle.label: Visual Style
visualStyle.tooltip: Specify the style of the image to be generated. 'Platform Specific' will try to use a style popular on the selected platform.

contentType.label: Content Type
contentType.tooltip: 'Post' is standard organic content. 'Advertisement' will generate content with a headline and call to action (CTA), optimized for paid promotions.

aiModel.label: AI Model
aiModel.tooltip: 'Flash' is faster, ideal for simpler tasks. 'Pro' (premium feature) is more advanced and generates more creative, complex content.

aspectRatio.label: Aspect Ratio
aspectRatio.tooltip: Choose the aspect ratio for the generated image.
aspectRatio.tooltipVideo: Choose the aspect ratio for the generated video (landscape or portrait).

imageForVideo.label: Starting Image for Video
imageForVideo.tooltip: Upload an image that will be the first frame of your video. The AI will bring it to life.

calendar.plannerSubtitle: Describe your goal, and the AI will create a strategic content plan for your calendar.
calendar.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Promote a new summer collection of dresses
calendar.planError: Failed to generate the plan. Please try again.
calendar.planActive: An AI-generated strategic plan is active. These are suggestions you can generate.

topicAssistant.title: Topic Assistant
topicAssistant.subtitle: Get help from AI to refine your post's topic.
topicAssistant.requestPlaceholder: e.g., make it more engaging, suggest 3 variations

generatorView.viewingHistory: You are viewing a saved item.

historySection.title: History
historySection.author: Author: {{name}}
historySection.noAnalyses: No additional analyses for this item.

draftsSection.title: Drafts
draftsSection.empty: Your saved drafts will appear here.

ready.title: Ready for AI magic?
ready.subtitle: Your generated content will appear here.

resultCard.pleaseWait: Please wait, AI is creating magic.

hero.title_part1: Dominate social media. Create content that
hero.subtitle: AI Content Pro is your intelligent assistant. Generate engaging posts, plan campaigns, and optimize your strategy based on data.
hero.sub_cta: Join 5,000+ marketers and creators. No credit card required.

assistant.greeting: Hello! How can I help you with this text? Feel free to speak or type commands.

tooltip.disabled: Add at least 3 favorite posts to unlock
tooltip.enabled: Analyze favorites to define a Brand Voice

status.disabled: Add {{count}} more post(s) for the AI to learn.
status.enabled: AI will analyze your favorite posts to define a Brand Voice.

brandVoiceManager.title: Manage Brand Voices
brandVoiceManager.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., We create AI tools for marketers...
brandVoiceManager.keywordsPlaceholder: e.g., AI, marketing, social media, productivity
brandVoiceManager.avoidPlaceholder: e.g., overly formal language, complex jargon
brandVoiceManager.dosPlaceholder: Enter a sentence that captures your brand's style...
brandVoiceManager.dontsPlaceholder: Enter a sentence that is in the wrong style...
brandVoiceManager.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?

analysisModal.title: AI Analysis
analysisModal.promptPlaceholderImage: e.g., Describe the composition of this image, suggest improvements.
analysisModal.promptPlaceholderText: e.g., What is the sentiment of this text? Suggest 3 other headlines.

visualStudio.title: AI Visual Studio
visualStudio.subtitle: Edit the image with text prompts or adjust it manually.
visualStudio.promptPlaceholder: e.g., 'add sunglasses to the dog', 'change the background to a beach'
visualStudio.errorLoad: Could not load image for editing. This might be due to CORS policy. Try using another image.

errors.api_not_available: AI API is not available. Check your API key or log in.
errors.limit_reached: Usage limit for your plan has been reached.

apiKeyInvalid.title: API Key Problem
apiKeyInvalid.details: Your API key is invalid or lacks permissions. Please check your key settings in Google AI Studio.

safetyBlock.title: Content Blocked
safetyBlock.details: The generated content was blocked for safety reasons. Please try modifying your prompt.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limit Exceeded
rateLimit.details: You are sending too many requests. Please try again in a moment.

videoKeyRequired.title: Video API Key Required
videoKeyRequired.details: Video generation requires selecting an API key with billing enabled. Please select a key to continue.

errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

videoKeyModal.title: API Key Required
videoKeyModal.description: Veo video generation requires selecting an API key with billing enabled. For more information, see the <1>billing documentation</1>.

dashboard.noTrends: No trends found. Try another niche.

weeklySummary.title: Weekly Summary
weeklySummary.start: Start creating content to see your weekly summary!
weeklySummary.summary: This week, you've mostly created content for {{platform}} in a {{tone}} tone. Keep up the great work!

storyboard.title: AI Storyboard Creator
storyboard.subtitle: Bring your ideas to life. Describe a topic, and AI will generate a complete video script.
storyboard.topicPlaceholder: e.g., a 30-second ad for a new coffee brand

firstPost.name: First Step
firstPost.description: Generate your very first piece of content.

strategist.title: AI Strategist
strategist.subtitle: Get a comprehensive strategic audit of your brand's content.

form.goalLabel: Primary business goal for the next quarter
form.goalPlaceholder: e.g., Increase brand awareness, drive sales for Product X
form.audiencePlaceholder: e.g., Tech-savvy millennials, small business owners
form.competitorsLabel: Competitors' social media URLs (optional, one per line)

loading.title: AI is conducting your strategic audit...
loading.subtitle: This may take a minute. We're analyzing market data and your content history to build the best strategy.

locked.title: Unlock the AI Strategist
locked.description: Upgrade to the Pro plan to get a comprehensive strategic audit, a 30-day content plan, and competitive insights.
